citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:34 PM on April 3,
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door and calling. Failure to provide access to
the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide
access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
Additional Inspectors:
Patricia Laracuente, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICEREnd Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:34 PM on April 3, 
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door and calling. Failure to provide access to 
the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide 
access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
Additional Inspectors: 
Patricia Laracuente, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICEREnd Section
